name: Kohler Swing Studio & Golf Shop
about: Kohler Swing Studio & Golf Shop is part of the larger Kohler resort destination, offering high-end Premier golf simulators powered by aboutGOLF technology. The facility provides access to over 60 world-class courses, including the exclusive Whistling Straits and Blackwolf Run, all at an hourly rate of $60. It caters to both individual practice sessions and group events, supporting up to 16 guests for competitive play, leagues, or casual rounds. The venue is situated within a comprehensive resort ecosystem that includes luxury accommodations, fine dining, and extensive wellness options.
why_golfers_like_it: Official PGA Tour simulator technology providing course-accurate play
Access to exclusive Kohler courses like Whistling Straits and Blackwolf Run
Supports group events for up to 16 guests, ideal for corporate outings or leagues
Located within a full-service resort with dining and wellness amenities

food_and_drink.notes: Elevated food and beverage offerings from Taverne on Woodlake, featuring wood-roasted flavors and signature cocktails
Signature cocktails and refreshing beverages available at the venue

simulator_hardware.notes: Official golf simulator of the PGA Tour

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, golf simulators typically require clubs. It's recommended to bring your own equipment or check with the venue about rental options.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers food and beverage options from Taverne on Woodlake. Outside food and drinks may not be permitted, but specific policies aren't detailed.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: The time for an 18-hole round isn't specified, but standard simulator sessions are priced by the hour, so timing would depend on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the Kohler resort includes family-friendly accommodations and activities, suggesting the Swing Studio caters to families, though specific age restrictions for simulator use aren't mentioned.
